candidate.title: Network storage topology, checkpoint/resiliency, benchmark mechanics, and incident boundary evidence

repo_state.git_status_before_task: git status --short showed task-local edits already in progress when JSON state was updated.

local_checks.raw_manifest_scan: Searched local raw/links, raw/crawler, raw/github, ai_infra manifests, coverage-map.json, loop-state.json, ingest.md, and r8 task-1 state for network-storage, topology, benchmark, performance, checkpoint, training data path, inference data path, EFA, FSx, Lustre, WEKA, Ceph, SPDK, NVMe-oF, RoCE, Spectrum-X, BGP PIC, ECN, DC-QCN, SHARP, NVBandwidth, DPU, SmartNIC, incident, postmortem, outage, degradation, recovery, remediation, and root-cause terms.
local_checks.wiki_search: Network Storage Cluster Infrastructure and AI Infra Coverage Map already covered EFA, FSx for Lustre, WEKA, Ceph, SPDK NVMe-oF, Spectrum-X/RoCE, SHARP, NVBandwidth, NCCL RAS, and local DPU/SmartNIC/NVMe-oF product signals. Both pages explicitly left topology, workload-specific benchmark, training/checkpoint data-path, non-NVIDIA operations, and production incident/postmortem gaps open.
local_checks.domain_index_scan: ai_infra wiki/index.md already routed Network Storage Cluster Infrastructure, AI Infra Coverage Map, NCCL Technical Blog Network Observability, and Compute Accelerator Parameter Comparison; task-2 updates existing reference pages and does not create a standalone curated page.

duplicate_checks.result: primary duplicate boundary for EFA, FSx for Lustre, WEKA, Ceph, SPDK NVMe-oF, Spectrum-X/RoCE, local DPU/SmartNIC/NVMe-oF, and current network-storage coverage; updated only for HyperPod topology/checkpoint/resiliency and MLCommons benchmark-method evidence.

duplicate boundary for Spectrum-X, RoCE, BGP PIC convergence, ECN/DC-QCN, SHARP, NVBandwidth, NCCL RAS, NIC Fusion, and fabric telemetry; not edited because task-2 adds AWS/MLCommons storage topology and benchmark evidence.
duplicate boundary for AWS Trainium2 EFAv3 and DPU/SmartNIC/NVMe-oF product rows; not edited because task-2 does not fill hardware SKU fields.

duplicate boundary for inference deployment-control evidence; task-2 avoids repeating Ray Serve, Knative, KServe, canary, rollout, rollback, and inference autoscaling claims except as non-overlap context.

selected_source_candidates.coverage: AWS HyperPod topology-aware scheduling, Slurm topology placement boundaries, EFA health checks, node replacement, checkpoint-aware resume, FSx/EFA cluster configuration surfaces, and MLCommons Storage benchmark method/result-framework evidence.

Blocked incident/postmortem promotion record plus HyperPod resiliency mechanics; no public EFA, RoCE/Spectrum-X, Lustre, WEKA, Ceph, or NVMe-oF postmortem was promoted without impact, timeline, environment, remediation, and owner follow-up evidence.

blocked_or_skipped_external_sources.reason: Search probes for EFA, RoCE/Spectrum-X, Lustre, WEKA, Ceph, FSx for Lustre, and NVMe-oF incident/postmortem sources did not produce a primary source with impact, timeline, environment, remediation, and ownership fields.
blocked_or_skipped_external_sources.policy: Do not promote incident/postmortem readiness without complete primary-source postmortem evidence.

blocked_or_skipped_external_sources.reason: MLCommons Storage was promoted as benchmark method/result-framework evidence. No individual submission or vendor result was promoted because this task did not preserve exact submission, hardware/cloud environment, topology, storage/fabric configuration, and measured result boundaries.
blocked_or_skipped_external_sources.policy: Do not rank product or provider storage performance from benchmark metadata alone.

blocked_or_skipped_external_sources.reason: No repeated source family needed scheduled refresh; one-shot bounded raw notes were sufficient.
blocked_or_skipped_external_sources.policy: Prefer one-shot bounded notes unless duplicate/gap proof shows a repeated source needs scheduled refresh.

gap_reason: The local wiki and raw corpus already covered architecture-level EFA, FSx for Lustre, WEKA, Ceph, SPDK NVMe-oF, Spectrum-X/RoCE, SHARP, NVBandwidth, NCCL RAS, and local DPU/SmartNIC/NVMe-oF product evidence, but did not preserve a source-backed training-cluster topology/checkpoint data-path or AI storage benchmark-method boundary. The selected AWS HyperPod and MLCommons Storage sources fill topology, checkpoint/resiliency, EFA health-check, and benchmark-method coverage while keeping production postmortems, exact measured product/provider benchmark submissions, and broader non-AWS/non-NVIDIA fabric operations open.
